title: Matomo vs Plausible
description: Compare Matomo vs Plausible in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right analytics & data tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Plausible emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Matomo or Plausible?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Plausible edges ahead with a 4.6/5 rating. Matomo excels at Matomo is a analytics & data platform that helps Privacy Teams and Marketers and, while Plausible is stronger for Privacy-first web analytics platform without cookies..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Matomo and Plausible?
faqs.answer: Matomo and Plausible differ in pricing (Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo vs $9-69/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Matomo cheaper than Plausible?
faqs.answer: Matomo starts at Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo while Plausible starts at $9-69/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Matomo or Plausible?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for analytics & data. Plausible scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Matomo and Plausible together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Matomo or Plausible?
faqs.answer: Both Matomo and Plausible prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which analytics & data tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Matomo for large teams, while Plausible may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free (self-hosted) – $26/mo pricing.
